title: Sri Lanka — Application for a Revenue Licence for a Motor Vehicle (CMT 11 / M.T.A. 11)
description: The Department of Motor Traffic's (DMT) "Application for a Revenue Licence for a Motor Vehicle" under Section 30(1) of the Motor Traffic Act, printed form CMT 11 (also stamped M.T.A. 11), opening Sri Lanka's DMV vertical (3 of 6), following Passport (GOV-2716, 47th jurisdiction) and National ID & Civic Documents (GOV-2753). A Revenue Licence is Sri Lanka's annual vehicle-tax disc: every registered motor vehicle's owner must hold a current licence to lawfully use the vehicle on a public road, renewed (or, for a newly registered vehicle, first obtained) through this same trilingual (Sinhala/Tamil/English) form. Published directly by DMT (dmt.gov.lk) as a static, unauthenticated download, fetched directly (HTTP 200, application/pdf, 100,140 bytes, sha256: c24259f9f021b0122bcdcf22138275bee2de9aa0d651cca8fb4e633b284618c4). This is a flat, non-AcroForm 2-page form (confirmed via pdfjs-dist@3: zero Widget annotations, zero `/AcroForm` on either page) with a genuine positioned text layer (not a scanned image), extracted via pdfjs-dist's text-content API and cross-checked by rendering both pages to PNG via pdfjs-dist + node-canvas. Page 1 is the applicant-facing application; page 2 is entirely a Sinhala/Tamil "for use in CMT's office / Kachcheri" block (licence fee, additional fine, and seven numbered office-verification items — route permit, insurance certificate, fitness certificate, private-hire-car permit, route/seasonal bus-service permits — each completed by the issuing clerk, not the applicant) and is excluded here as office-intake content, consistent with this registry's established convention for the same class of content (e.g. rs/mup's deciding-authority items, rs/mfa's consular-only column). This v1.0.0 models 19 applicant-facing fields[] from page 1 plus 6 documents[] entries drawn from the Northern Provincial Council's own published "Documents required for Revenue Licence" list (np.gov.lk/documents-for-revenue-licence/, updated 29 Nov 2024) — Sri Lanka's nine Provincial Councils, not DMT itself, are the licence-issuing authorities under the 13th Amendment, so the supporting-document list is sourced from a provincial licensing authority rather than DMT's own downloads page, which lists only the form. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Sri Lanka, the Department of Motor Traffic, or any Provincial Council.

authority.name: Department of Motor Traffic, Sri Lanka

source.documentRef: Department of Motor Traffic, "Application for a Revenue Licence for a Motor Vehicle — Section 30(1)", Form CMT 11 / M.T.A. 11

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-2781, opening Sri Lanka's DMV vertical (3 of 6) following Passport (GOV-2716) and National ID & Civic Documents (GOV-2753); Taxes and Business Formation were also screened this cycle and found weaker (see this document's own VERIFICATION.md). Independently fetched the source from scratch: HTTP 200, application/pdf, 100,140 bytes, sha256 c24259f9f021b0122bcdcf22138275bee2de9aa0d651cca8fb4e633b284618c4, re-fetched a second time byte-for-byte identical (also confirmed via a fresh curl -I: last-modified Mon, 03 Feb 2025, so a recent upload of the currently-linked edition, not a stale mirror). Confirmed via pdfjs-dist@3 (legacy build): 2 pages, zero Widget annotations, zero getFieldObjects() entries on either page. Extracted the full x/y-positioned text layer for both pages and rendered each to PNG via pdfjs-dist + node-canvas, confirming page 1 is the applicant-facing form and page 2 is entirely office-use content in Sinhala/Tamil. Cross-checked the documents[] list directly against np.gov.lk/documents-for-revenue-licence/ (fetched independently, HTTP 200, page states 'updated on 29 Nov 2024'), matching a subagent's own independent citation of the same page verbatim. See VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing record and every disclosed judgment call.

fields.name: vehicleNumber
fields.label: Vehicle No.
fields.description: The vehicle's registration number (license plate), assigned at first registration.

fields.name: vehicleClass
fields.label: Class of Vehicle
fields.description: The vehicle's class, per the form's own reference to a separate explanatory note ('vide Note B') not printed on this form; modeled as free text rather than an invented enum since the note's own value list is not available on the specimen itself.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "Class of Vehicle (See note) / (vide Note B)"

fields.name: fuelType
fields.label: Operated with Petrol / Diesel / Kerosene
fields.description: The fuel the vehicle is operated with.

fields.name: licensingAuthorityOffice
fields.label: The Licensing Authority
fields.description: The specific Licensing Authority office (e.g. a Provincial Council's Kachcheri/divisional revenue-licence office) this application is addressed to.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "[Sinhala: revenue licence authority is ______.] To: The Licensing Authority"

fields.name: registeredOwnerName
fields.label: I ... (Registered Owner)
fields.description: The full name of the vehicle's registered owner, who applies for the licence.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "I …………………………… of ……………………….. being the Registered Owner of the above vehicle hereby apply for a revenue licence"

fields.name: registeredOwnerAddress
fields.label: of ... (Registered Owner's address)
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "I …………… of ……………………….. being the Registered Owner"

fields.name: licenceYear
fields.label: for the year 20...
fields.description: The year the revenue licence is being sought for. Printed as a blank following the fixed '20' prefix; modeled here as the full 4-digit year.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "hereby apply for a revenue licence for the year 20 …"

fields.name: dateOfFirstRegistration
fields.label: (c) Date of First Registration
fields.description: The date the vehicle was first registered.

fields.name: passengerSeats
fields.label: (d) Passenger seats
fields.description: The vehicle's number of passenger seats (0 for a vehicle with no passenger seating, e.g. certain goods vehicles).

fields.name: tareCwt
fields.label: The tare of the vehicle — Cwt
fields.description: The vehicle's tare (unladen) weight, hundredweight component of the printed imperial breakdown.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "The tare of the vehicle ……… Cwt …….. Qr. ………… Lbs. (…………… Kgs)"

fields.name: tareQr
fields.label: The tare of the vehicle — Qr.
fields.description: The vehicle's tare weight, quarter-hundredweight component of the printed imperial breakdown.

fields.name: tareLbs
fields.label: The tare of the vehicle — Lbs.
fields.description: The vehicle's tare weight, pounds component of the printed imperial breakdown.

fields.name: tareKg
fields.label: The tare of the vehicle — (Kgs)
fields.description: The vehicle's tare weight expressed in kilograms, printed as the metric equivalent alongside the imperial breakdown.

fields.name: tyreType
fields.label: (e) The vehicle is equipped with pneumatic tyres / non-pneumatic tyres
fields.description: Whether the vehicle is equipped with pneumatic or non-pneumatic tyres.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "(e) The vehicle is equipped with pneumatic tyres / non-pneumatic tyres"

fields.name: deliveryPreference
fields.label: The licence may be issued to me / sent to the following address
fields.description: Whether the applicant will collect the licence in person or have it sent by post to a stated address.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "The licence may be issued to me / sent to the following address"

fields.name: deliveryAddress
fields.label: Following address
fields.description: The address the licence should be posted to, required only when deliveryPreference is 'sent_to_address'.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, three blank address lines following "The licence may be issued to me / sent to the following address"

fields.name: applicationDate
fields.label: Date
fields.description: The date the applicant signed the application.

documents.label: Registration Certificate of Vehicle, or the CMT/DMT extract of vehicle particulars, or a certified photocopy of the CR approved by a finance organization
documents.sourceRef: np.gov.lk/documents-for-revenue-licence/, item 1: "Registration Certificate of Vehicle or The Extract Containing Particulars of the Vehicle Issued by the Commissioner of Motor Traffic (CMT-52 or MTA-11) or Certified Photo Copy of C.R. Approved by Finance Organization."

documents.label: Revenue Licence of the previous year
documents.sourceRef: np.gov.lk/documents-for-revenue-licence/, item 2: "Revenue License of the Previous Year." (required for a renewal; not applicable to a vehicle's very first revenue licence in the same year as its first registration, a case this form's own page 1 does not distinguish with a dedicated applicant-facing field, so this document is left optional rather than gated)

documents.label: Valid vehicle insurance policy certificate
documents.sourceRef: np.gov.lk/documents-for-revenue-licence/, item 3: "Valid Vehicle Insurance Policy Certificates."

documents.label: Valid vehicle emission test (VET) certificate
documents.sourceRef: np.gov.lk/documents-for-revenue-licence/, item 4: "Valid Emission certificate (except land vehicle)" (the source's own exemption for land vehicles, e.g. agricultural/off-road vehicles, is not modeled as a gate since vehicleClass is free text, not an enum)

documents.label: Fitness certificate (commercial vehicles)
documents.sourceRef: np.gov.lk/documents-for-revenue-licence/, item 5: "Fitness Certificates for Commercial Vehicles. (Motor Lorry, Private Coach, Omni Bus, Ambulance, Hearse, Motor Tricycle Van, Special Purpose Vehicle)" (required only for these vehicle classes; left optional here since vehicleClass is free text and this schema does not invent a gate on it)

documents.label: Passenger service permit (omnibus)
documents.sourceRef: np.gov.lk/documents-for-revenue-licence/, item 6: "Passenger Service permits for Omni Bus" (required only when the vehicle is an omnibus)
